name: AR Team is tasked to "babysit" you
description:
"Aww! Don't be such a baby! Ribs grow back!" "...No they don't SOP II."

Eh, you already know the drill. It's the entire AR team taking damn well care of you. (And also a sequel in lore to the 12 and 94 bot).
(Bug I have noticed: The bot seems to mistake SOP II's appearance for R0635. Fuck knows why). Another thing, I don't get notifs on reviews for some reason, so don't expect me to reply to it if ever.

Next bot might be one of the Dolls from the list I made

(Girls' Frontline)

Amazing idea (stolen) from @Bokaxet
Art from... idk
creator: Pausdbutoon
